welcome.headline: Your Complete Music Creation Studio
welcome.subheadline: Create, collaborate, and distribute your music with AI-powered tools and professional-grade instruments — all in the cloud.
welcome.legal_note: By continuing, you agree to our {terms_link} and {privacy_link}.

_notes.legal_note: [PLACEHOLDER] {terms_link} and {privacy_link} are inline hyperlinks. Do not reorder. Link placement may shift in RTL languages.

_notes.step_label: [PLACEHOLDER] {current} and {total} are integers. Ensure numeric formatting matches locale conventions.
_notes.finish_button: Must match welcome.cta_primary exactly — single source of truth.

signup.page_subtitle: Join {user_count} musicians and producers on ECHOCRAFT.
signup.field_password_hint: Use a mix of letters, numbers, and symbols.

_notes.page_subtitle: [PLACEHOLDER] {user_count} is a formatted integer. Do not translate the placeholder. [EXPANSION RISK]
_notes.signin_prompt: [PLACEHOLDER] {signin_link} is an inline hyperlink. Do not move outside the sentence.

signin.page_subtitle: Sign in to continue to your studio.

_notes.signup_prompt: [PLACEHOLDER] {signup_link} is an inline hyperlink. Brand name ECHOCRAFT is always uppercase — must not be translated or adapted.
_notes.submit_button: Title case. Must match dashboard.nav.sign_in casing for consistency.

profile_setup.page_subtitle: Tell us about yourself so we can personalise your experience.
profile_setup.field_display_name_placeholder: How other creators will see you

_notes.page_subtitle: [EXPANSION RISK] Monitor carefully for German — compound noun structures extend this significantly.
_notes.field_role_label: [EXPANSION RISK] The trailing ellipsis (…) is intentional punctuation. Preserve in translation if natural in target language.
_notes.field_role_option_mixing_engineer: [GENDER HOOK] DE: Ingenieur/Ingenieurin requires gender agreement. Flag for German translators.
_notes.field_role_option_sound_designer: [GENDER HOOK] Same gender consideration as mixing_engineer for German.

plan_selection.page_subtitle: From solo artists to full production teams, we have a plan that fits your creative needs.
plan_selection.billing_free_trial_note: Start your free trial — no credit card required.

_notes.tier_label_starter: Brand tier name. Do not translate — use as-is or discuss with localization lead.
_notes.tier_label_pro: Brand tier name. Do not translate.
_notes.tier_label_max: Brand tier name. Do not translate.
_notes.tier_badge_popular: [EXPANSION RISK] Very short string in EN. High expansion risk in DE and ES.
_notes.pricing_per_month: Displayed inline after price: '$29/month'. Currency symbol and formatting handled separately by the billing system.
_notes.pricing_per_user: Displayed below per_month in Studio plans.

_notes.creator_starter_name: [EXPANSION RISK] Plan names are brand identifiers. Tier labels (Starter, Pro, Max) must not be translated. Audience labels (Creator, Studio) may be localised.
_notes.creator_pro_tagline: [EXPANSION RISK] Short taglines. DE expansion expected: 'Full songwriting workflow' → 'Vollständiger Songwriting-Workflow'.

_notes.midi_editor: DAW technical term. Do not translate literally in DE/ES — preserve anglicism or consult Black Ice ontology for approved term.
_notes.piano_roll: DAW technical term. Anglicism preferred in both ES-ES and DE.
_notes.pattern_sequencer: DAW technical term. Check Black Ice for approved ES/DE terms.
_notes.punch_in_recording: DAW technical term. Anglicism likely preferred. Confirm with ontology.
_notes.style_transfer: AI feature term. Do not translate — use approved term from Black Ice AI Composition ontology.

confirmation.page_subtitle: Your studio is ready. Let's create something.

_notes.page_title: [PLACEHOLDER] {name} is the user's display name. [GENDER HOOK] DE/ES may require gender-inflected adjectives if sentence is expanded. Flag for review.
_notes.checklist_plan: [PLACEHOLDER] {plan_name} inserts a localised plan name (e.g. 'Creator Pro').
